teaser: Build the upper-floor of the web stack.

mini_quizzes.title: MQ-1 · Semantic HTML5
mini_quizzes.teaser: header, nav, main, article, section, aside, footer — plus when to use <figure>, <dialog>, <details>, and <time>.

mini_quizzes.title: MQ-2 · Forms & Validation
mini_quizzes.teaser: client-side constraints, pattern, autocomplete, multi-step forms, FormData, and progressive enhancement when JS is blocked.

mini_quizzes.title: MQ-3 · Accessibility (WCAG & ARIA)
mini_quizzes.teaser: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, focus order, live regions, role/aria-*, screen-reader testing on a real phone.

mini_quizzes.title: MQ-4 · APIs & Advanced Features
mini_quizzes.teaser: fetch + Service Workers, IndexedDB, Web Components, <slot>, custom elements, and offline-first PWAs.
